emails.subject: Eastland Chemical Co.
emails.body: Eastland Chemical Co. Jennifer McQuade with EOL called checking on the status of your conv. w/Elzear Lemieux with cpy. Have you resolved the ETA questions yet?

emails.subject: Eastland Chemical Co.
emails.body: Eastland Chemical Co. Jennifer McQuade with EOL called checking on the status of your conv. w/Elzear Lemieux with cpy. Have you resolved the ETA questions yet?

emails.subject: Re: Eastland Chemical Co.
emails.body: Re: Eastland Chemical Co. No we've been trading voice mails for days. (He was out of the office for several days.) He called me Friday and now I'm it. I'll give him a call this afternoon or in the morning. Leslie Tana Jones 11/13/2000 01:08 PM
